languages.text: {n}Торжественный бинарный гимн, изливающийся из вокс-передатчиков аугментационного трона, прерывает рассуждения манипулуса, возвещая о завершении операции. Антиграв-генератор Эоганна вновь оживает, и генетор плавно воспаряет в воздух. Кажется, кровавый эксперимент, только что проведенный им на самом себе, не оставил никаких катастрофических последствий. Нунциус молчаливой тенью взлетает следом.{/n}

{n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Торжественный бинарный гимн, изливающийся из вокс-передатчиков аугментационного трона, прерывает рассуждения манипулуса, возвещая о завершении операции. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine triumphale binhärische Hymne aus den Vox-Transmittern des Implantationsthrons stört die Grübelei des Manipulus und zeigt den Abschluss der Prozedur an. Eogunns Antigravitationsgenerator erwacht wieder zum Leben und der Genetor schwebt sanft in die Luft. Wie es scheint, hatte das blutige Experiment, das er gerade an sich selbst angestellt hat, keine katastrophalen Konsequenzen. Nuncius erhebt sich hinter ihm wie ein lautloser Schatten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine triumphale binhärische Hymne aus den Vox-Transmittern des Implantationsthrons stört die Grübelei des Manipulus und zeigt den Abschluss der Prozedur an. Eogunns Antigravitationsgenerator erwacht wieder zum Leben und der Genetor schwebt sanft in die Luft. Wie es scheint, hatte das blutige Experiment, das er gerade an sich selbst angestellt hat, keine katastrophalen Konsequenzen. Nuncius erhebt sich hinter ihm wie ein lautloser Schatten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un hymne binhaire triomphant venu des transmetteurs-vox du fauteuil d'implantation interrompt les réflexions du manipulus pour indiquer que la procédure est terminée. Le générateur d'anti-gravité d'Eogunn se réactive, et le genetor se met à flotter dans les airs. Il semble que l'expérience sanglante à laquelle il vient de se soumettre n'a eu aucune conséquence catastrophique. Nuncius s'élève à sa suite comme une ombre silencieuse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un hymne binhaire triomphant venu des transmetteurs-vox du fauteuil d'implantation interrompt les réflexions du manipulus pour indiquer que la procédure est terminée. Le générateur d'anti-gravité d'Eogunn se réactive, et le genetor se met à flotter dans les airs. Il semble que l'expérience sanglante à laquelle il vient de se soumettre n'a eu aucune conséquence catastrophique. Nuncius s'élève à sa suite comme une ombre silencieuse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一阵胜利的二进制颂歌从移植王座的音阵传输器中喷涌而出，打断了这位操纵者的自言自语，同时也宣告着手术的完成。伊奥贡的反重力装置再次启动，这位基因士平稳地漂浮到空中。看来，他刚刚对自己实施的血腥实验并没有造成灾难性后果。努恩修斯亦跟随他，静默无声地升起。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一阵胜利的二进制颂歌从移植王座的音阵传输器中喷涌而出，打断了这位操纵者的自言自语，同时也宣告着手术的完成。伊奥贡的反重力装置再次启动，这位基因士平稳地漂浮到空中。看来，他刚刚对自己实施的血腥实验并没有造成灾难性后果。努恩修斯亦跟随他，静默无声地升起。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un himno binario triunfal brota de los voco emisores del trono de implantación e interrumpen la meditación del manipulus, indicando el final del proceso. El generador de antigravedad de Eogunn vuelve a la vida y el generto empieza a elevarse suavemente. El sangriento experimento que se ha aplicado a sí mismo no ha tenido consecuencias desastrosas. Nuncius se eleva tras él, como una sombra silenciosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un himno binario triunfal brota de los voco emisores del trono de implantación e interrumpen la meditación del manipulus, indicando el final del proceso. El generador de antigravedad de Eogunn vuelve a la vida y el generto empieza a elevarse suavemente. El sangriento experimento que se ha aplicado a sí mismo no ha tenido consecuencias desastrosas. Nuncius se eleva tras él, como una sombra silenciosa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}オーグメンテーション・タウンのボックス・キャスターから流れる勝利の賛美歌が、マニピュラスの思考を中断させ、操作の完了を告げる。エオガンの反重力ジェネレーターに再び命が吹き込まれ、ジェネレーターはスムーズに宙に浮く。どうやらエオガン自身が経験した怪奇現象は、破滅的な結果を残さなかったようだ。ヌンジウスは静かな影となって飛び去る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A triumphant binary hymn pouring from the vox-casters of the augmentation throne interrupts the manipulus' musings, heralding the completion of the operation. Eogann's anti-grav generator comes to life once more, and the generator floats smoothly into the air. It seems that the monstrous experience he has just had on himself has left no catastrophic consequences behind. Nunzius flies off in silent shadow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İmplantasyon tahtının voks vericilerinden dökülen muzaffer bir ikilidil ilahi, Manipülus'un düşüncelerini bölerek prosedürün tamamlandığının sinyalini veriyor. Eogunn'un yer çekimi önleyici jeneratörü yeniden canlanıyor ve Genetör, pürüzsüz bir şekilde havaya süzülüyor. Görünüşe göre az önce kendi üzerinde gerçekleştirdiği kanlı deneyin hiçbir feci sonucu olmamış. Nuncius, sessiz bir gölge gibi ardından yükseliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}
